_comment_nist_fields: Fields below follow IR 8278Ar1 Section 3.2 OLIR template
focal_document_element_description: Ability to train other cyberspace operators.
reference_document_element_description: Ability to navigate ethical trade-offs in AI deployment where competing values such as fairness versus accuracy, transparency versus privacy, or speed versus safety require principled resolution.
comments: DCWF ksa intersects with WIDAI AG domain. AG-A-002 is the strongest semantic match. Secondary: OP-S-010 (OP, cosine: 0.437), SP-A-003 (SP, cosine: 0.427).
_comment_widai_extensions: Fields below are WIDAI extensions per ADR-014

primary_method.name: Cross-Encoder STS
primary_method.description: Semantic Textual Similarity via cross-encoder regression trained on STS-Benchmark.
primary_method.significance: STS 2.9/10 (raw 0.293). Shared vocabulary: [ability]. DCWF-only terms [cyberspace, operators, train] vs WIDAI-only terms [accuracy, ai, competing, deployment, ethical, fairness] define the semantic distance between the descriptions.

bertscore.significance: BERTScore F1=0.851 (P=0.884, R=0.820). P exceeds R by 0.065 — the DCWF element's 6 words are well-captured by the WIDAI KSA's 26 words, but the KSA contains additional specificity not reflected in the DCWF element.

nli_cross_encoder.significance: NLI: neutral-dominant (98.6%). "Ability to train other cyberspace operators." and "Ability to navigate ethical trade-offs in AI deployment where competing values s" are related but neither implies nor contradicts the other. Standard result for cross-framework mapping where two independent frameworks describe overlapping competencies with independent vocabulary.

biencoder_cosine.description: Bi-encoder sentence embeddings with cosine similarity.
biencoder_cosine.significance: Bi-encoder 0.440 > STS 0.293 (gap +0.147). Independent encoding finds more similarity than cross-attention. Shared surface terms [ability] inflate the bi-encoder, but cross-attention detects semantic divergence beneath the vocabulary overlap.

jaccard_token.description: Token-level Jaccard similarity (intersection/union of lowercased word tokens).
jaccard_token.significance: Jaccard 6.9%. Shared tokens: [ability]. DCWF-only: [cyberspace, operators, train]. WIDAI-only: [accuracy, ai, competing, deployment, ethical, fairness].
